arguments.final_answer:
Created src/__tests__/event-bus.test.ts with 6 tests:

- Multiple listeners: all called on emit
- off: removes specific handler, others unaffected
- once: fires handler exactly once
- Argument passing: all args forwarded

All 6 tests pass.
